# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

default:
  image: alpine:3.19

variables:
  ARTIFACT_EXPIRE_IN: 30 days

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - mkdir -p dist/bin dist/config
    - echo '#!/bin/sh' > dist/bin/app
    - echo 'echo "Running application binary"' >> dist/bin/app
    - chmod +x dist/bin/app
    - echo 'APP_ENV=production' > dist/config/app.env
    - echo 'version=1.0.0' > dist/config/version.conf
  artifacts:
    name: "build-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    expire_in: $ARTIFACT_EXPIRE_IN
    paths:
      - dist/bin/
      - dist/config/

test_artifacts:
  stage: test
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - test -f dist/bin/app
    - test -f dist/config/app.env
    - ./dist/bin/app
    - cat dist/config/app.env
    - cat dist/config/version.conf

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging"
    - chmod +x dist/bin/app
    - ./dist/bin/app
    - echo "Using config:"
    - cat dist/config/app.env
    - cat dist/config/version.conf
  environment:
    name: staging

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production"
    - chmod +x dist/bin/app
    - ./dist/bin/app
    - echo "Using config:"
    - cat dist/config/app.env
    - cat dist/config/version.conf
  environment:
    name: production
  when: manual
  only:
    - main
